response.title: Lead Corporate Counsel
response.description: We are seeking an experienced Lead Corporate Counsel to join our dynamic legal team at Global Tech Solutions. The ideal candidate will possess extensive knowledge of corporate law, including mergers and acquisitions, compliance, and intellectual property. This role requires strong leadership skills, with the ability to mentor junior lawyers and manage complex legal projects.

required_skills: 10+ years of experience in corporate law
Strong knowledge of compliance and regulatory frameworks
Proficiency in contract negotiation and drafting
Ability to manage legal risk assessments
Leadership experience in a legal setting
requirements.education: Juris Doctor (JD) from an accredited law school
